title: Design the chunking strategy
description: Choose split boundaries, size, and overlap from the document structure and embedding limits, then validate retrievability.
body: Steps: 1. Inspect the corpus structure (headings, tables, code, prose) and the embedding model's effective length. 2. Pick boundaries that keep a unit of meaning intact and set overlap to preserve cross-boundary context. 3. Size chunks within the embedding range without diluting them. 4. Index a sample and run answer-spanning queries. 5. Adjust where answers fall across boundaries. Rollback point: before re-ingesting the full corpus. Validation: queries whose answers span boundaries still retrieve a self-contained chunk.
